subject: Sports
title: Simone Biles and Mental Health
description: A short lesson to help you apply Simone Biles and Mental Health.

hook.text: The greatest gymnast alive withdrew from the Olympic final. The reason changed sport forever.

buildup.text: At Tokyo 2020, Simone Biles experienced the 'twisties'—a sudden loss of spatial awareness mid-air.

discovery.text: She withdrew from multiple events to protect her safety, choosing health over medals.

twist.text: Instead of criticism, she received overwhelming support. Athletes worldwide began speaking about mental health.

climax.text: Biles returned at Paris 2024 and won three golds, proving that stepping back can be the bravest move.

punchline.text: She showed that the strongest athletes know when to stop.

quiz.question: Why did Simone Biles withdraw from events at Tokyo 2020?
options: She experienced the 'twisties' and prioritized her mental health
